sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشُّعَرَاءُ الْقُدَمَاءُ يَكْتُبُونَ قَصَائِدَ جَمِيلَةً عَنِ الصَّحْرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Stari pjesnici su pisali lijepe pjesme o pustinji.
sentences.translationEn: Ancient poets used to write beautiful poems about the desert.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَتَحَدَّثُ عَنِ الْخَيْلِ وَالْكَرَمِ وَالشَّجَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: One govore o konjima, velikodušnosti i hrabrosti.
sentences.translationEn: They talk about horses, generosity, and courage.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ بَيْتٍ فِي الشِّعْرِ لَهُ نَغَمٌ خَاصٌّ.
sentences.translation: Svaki stih u poeziji ima poseban ritam.
sentences.translationEn: Every verse in the poetry has a special rhythm.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَقْرَأُ هَذِهِ الْأَشْعَارَ لِنَتَعَلَّمَ لُغَةَ الْفُصْحَى.
sentences.translation: Čitamo ove pjesme kako bismo naučili književni arapski jezik.
sentences.translationEn: We read these poems to learn the Modern Standard Arabic language.

sentences.arabic: الشِّعْرُ الْعَرَبِيُّ جُزْءٌ كَبِيرٌ مِنْ ثَقَافَتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Arapska poezija je veliki dio naše kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic poetry is a big part of our culture.
